name: claude-code-forge
description: A curated collection of plugins for Claude Code, enhancing your AI-powered development workflow.

plugins.name: pdforge
plugins.description: Product Development Forge - AI-driven 7-phase product development workflow. Provides complete methodology from requirements analysis to deployment, including brainstorming, TDD, three-stage review, and auto-fix loops.

plugins.name: adversarial-debugger
plugins.description: Adversarial Debugging with Agent Teams - Multiple agents investigate competing hypotheses in parallel, challenge each other's findings through structured debate, and converge on the true root cause.

plugins.name: design-clone
plugins.description: Design DNA extraction + pixel-perfect website cloning. Combines programmatic CSS extraction (Browser MCP + getComputedStyle) with a 3-dimension design profile schema (design system / design style / visual effects). Two modes: --dna-only outputs a structured 150+ field Design DNA JSON; --full additionally generates a Next.js pixel-perfect clone via parallel builder agents.

plugins.name: forge-teams
plugins.description: Agent Teams Product Development Pipeline - 7-phase adversarial collaborative development with multi-agent debate, competition, and cross-validation at every critical decision point, including red team attacks, adversarial debugging, self-healing parallel implementation with Wakeup Guard anti-blocking, independent bug fix loop (/forge-fix), and requirement verification (/forge-verify).

plugins.name: persona-distill
plugins.description: Persona Distillation Ecosystem - parameterized schema library + generation/evaluation/scheduling/debate toolkit for distilling personas (people or rule systems) into self-contained Claude Code skills. 5 skills, 9 schemas, 19 components (incl. execution-profile via Klein-RPD/CDM), 9-phase pipeline with v0.4.0 security: consent-attestation gate, untrusted-corpus delimiters, fingerprint verifier, self-containment linter, rubric config range locks, corpus_access_declared cross-check. 6 runnable parsers (iMessage/email/Twitter/generic/Telegram/Slack).

plugins.name: skill-evolve
plugins.description: Skill Evolution Engine — Darwin-style autonomous SKILL.md optimizer. Applies an 8-dimension rubric (60 structural + 40 effectiveness), independent-subagent scoring, and git-backed ratchet hill-climbing (keep-or-revert) to evolve any Claude Code skill from initial draft toward 90+. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch and alchaincyf/darwin-skill.

plugins.name: ratchet
plugins.description: Ratchet — Goal-driven multi-agent persistent optimization system. Combines Goal-Driven master/subagent separation with AutoResearch signal design methodology. Implements an 'independent evaluation + kill-and-restart + ratchet progress' autonomous loop: master only judges, subagent only executes; if a subagent stalls or claims success without meeting acceptance criteria, it is killed and replaced. Suitable for long-running autonomous coding tasks that require verifiable deliverables and explicit termination conditions.

plugins.name: bespoke-design-system
plugins.description: Generate a bespoke DESIGN.md for any product brief by reverse-engineering a corpus of existing DESIGN.md design systems into a computable design grammar (rules + rationale + relationships), then forward-generating with three-part rationale (inheritance + adaptation + justification). Outputs OD-dialect 9-section DESIGN.md (Visual Theme / Color / Typography / Components / Layout / Depth & Elevation / Do's & Don'ts / Responsive / Agent Prompt Guide) consumable by any DESIGN.md-compatible tool. Two interaction modes: interactive (one-shot question batching, max 7 questions, never interrupts mid-generation) or auto (zero-questions inference). Self-evolving: high-frequency adaptations consolidate into new rules. Material library is decoupled — works with OD's ~140 systems, awesome-design-md, or any DESIGN.md collection.
